workout.name: Run — aerobic 50 min
workout.description:
AEROBIC RUN — 50 MIN
• 50 minutes easy run, HR 140–148 • Conversational pace (~6:10–6:20 min/km) • If very hot — slow down, keep HR in zone • Optional at the end: 4–6 strides of 20 sec, rest 40 sec
GOAL: get the legs back into running rhythm. No pushing.
